violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food contact items with contaminated hands. Employees must wash hands and change gloves when switching from handling food wiping counters handling sanitizer cloths and other duties.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counters in the food prep area and server area.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exterior of cooking equipment plastic storege racks reachin cooler interiors and door gaskets date code machine screen and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door handles on reachin cooler (pie cooler) noted not in good repair.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor by dish machine and wall (brick) by pass through window.noted not smooth and easily cleanable. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counters in the food prep areas.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interiors ice machine interior and food scales not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers/freezers door handles on reachin cooler (pie cooler) and black plastic cart noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exterior of cooking equipment reachin cooler interiors and door gaskets date code machine screen and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
